overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a character navigating a foggy, dystopian scrapyard beneath massive highway overpasses at night. The character moves past a burning vehicle and an NPC detective, with neon-lit city architecture and holographic advertisements visible in the hazy distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned vehicle scrapyard beneath highway overpass

agents.ego_description: sprinting through the junkyard toward a burning vehicle visible in the distance

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass structure spanning the entire scene with support pillars
vehicle engulfed in orange flames producing thick smoke
derelict vehicles scattered throughout the scrapyard
large support column for the overpass structure
tall overhead light illuminating the foggy atmosphere

segments.scene_description: The character runs through a foggy scrapyard beneath massive concrete overpasses, approaching a burning vehicle in the distance. Abandoned cars and debris litter the ground while artificial lighting cuts through the hazy night air.

scene_state.functional_zone: scrapyard interior near burning vehicle with NPC presence

events.description: character passes close by the NPC, temporarily blocking the view of the burning car

agents.ego_description: slowing to a walk while approaching an NPC standing near the burning vehicle, then passing by

notable_agents.action: detective standing with hands in pockets near the burning car, observing the surroundings

entered.detail: piles of crushed and stacked vehicles forming walls in the scrapyard

segments.scene_description: The character slows down to approach an NPC detective standing near the burning vehicle. After passing the stationary figure, the burning car falls behind as the character moves deeper into the scrapyard past stacks of crushed vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep scrapyard with view of distant city skyline

events.description: view opens up to reveal distant city skyline with large holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: navigating through tightly packed abandoned cars and debris while moving toward the city view

entered.detail: large glowing holographic advertisement displaying a face on a distant skyscraper

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the scrapyard, the character passes stacks of crushed vehicles as the view opens to reveal a distant dystopian cityscape with towering buildings and holographic billboards visible through the fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: scrapyard edge adjacent to active elevated highway

events.description: character reaches the edge of the scrapyard where an active highway with moving traffic is visible
character turns right and moves back into the depths of the scrapyard away from the road

agents.ego_description: moving along the scrapyard perimeter observing traffic on the nearby highway before turning back into the junkyard interior

entered.detail: elevated highway with moving vehicle traffic and headlights visible through the fog
concrete barrier separating the scrapyard from the active roadway

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the scrapyard's edge where an active highway with moving traffic runs parallel. After observing the vehicles passing by, the character turns back into the junkyard's depths, moving beneath the massive concrete overpasses.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy scrapyard that transitions from a claustrophobic industrial wasteland to a wide view of a dystopian city before returning to the shadows. It begins with the character running beneath massive concrete overpasses through a haze of artificial light, moving toward the glow of a burning vehicle amidst scattered debris. As the character slows to pass a stationary detective, the fire recedes into the background and the path opens up, leading past towering stacks of crushed cars. The scene then expands to reveal a distant cityscape of towering buildings and holographic billboards shimmering through the fog before the camera reaches the scrapyard's edge beside an active highway of moving traffic. Finally, the character turns away from the road and retreats back into the depths of the junkyard, disappearing once more beneath the heavy concrete structures.
